sections.paragraph:
Original: כּלא

Transliteration: kâlâ'

Phonetic: kaw-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. to restrict, restrain, withhold, shut up, keep back, refrain, forbid
    1. (Qal)
      1. to shut up
      2. to restrain
      3. to withhold
    2. (Niphal) to be restrained
    3. (Piel) to finish

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 980

Part(s) of speech: Verb par
